title: Restaurant Operations Automation Concept
shortDescription: A modular workflow concept for menu inquiries, order type selection, delivery details, table bookings, order logging, and staff notification.
overview: The concept maps common restaurant customer interactions into a structured workflow.
It demonstrates how conversational automation can support—not replace—the operational team.
problem: Restaurants repeatedly answer the same menu, timing, delivery, and booking questions while manually transferring order details to staff.
solution: I designed a staged workflow for inquiry handling, order or booking capture, structured records, and staff alerts.
results: Clear handoff points between system and staff
